name: Kayson Chavez
ai_summary: Kayson Chavez has two years of experience as an assistant kids club manager working with ages 2–12, and is very patient and easygoing with children. Located in Mesa, AZ with a 30-mile travel radius and PT availability, he handles conflicts by separating children and maintaining a positive attitude even on challenging days.

transcripts.q3:
Hello, my name is Cason Chavez. I've been working with kids for about two years now, I was the assistant kids club manager at a gym. I love working with kids, I think they're so fun to interact with and it's very rewarding to see how they've grown and teach them life every single day. I've worked with kids from
 from ages 2 to 12 and I just love it.
transcripts.q4: I am in Mesa Arizona and I'm willing to travel up to 30 minutes. 30 miles to pick up shifts.
transcripts.q5: I'm looking for part-time work. I am a bartender on weekends. So I would like to work during the week, I'm willing to work a tower like shifts during the week but I don't have a set availability for one. I'd be able to work
transcripts.q6:
If two children are not getting along, we separate them and see what the situation is. If there's one kid, who's obviously enticing, another one we pull them aside and we have a talk with them.
 And then we keep an eye out on the kids. We do do, 5-minute, timeout. And if there's any physical altercation, we immediately have to report it and write a statement for it and called their parents, and then they do 15 minute time outs.
transcripts.q7:
I am very patient with kids. I also am very easy going and I can banter back and forth with them without them thinking that
 rules are being broken or that I am trying to
 Control what they're doing. I think I have a very good way of making. Sure the kids know that I'm in charge, but I always care about what they have to say and what they want. And that it's okay to have fun. I'm willing to have fun as long as everything gets done and I'm very positive. It takes a lot to bring my mood down. And so, even if there is a day where all of the kids are, a lot of the kids are having a notch.
 Octane kind of making a mess and wreaking havoc everywhere. I'm still able to stay positive and stay patient and work through that.
